# Stocks Review — 2026-06-29 (High-Confidence Final Table)

## NARRATIVE UPDATE

Three catalysts changed the picture since the June 28 report:
1. **Iran deal reached** (FT/Bloomberg, June 29) — US-Iran agreed to halt strikes and resume talks. Removes geopolitical risk premium that drove last week's S&P/Nasdaq pullback. Risk-on catalyst.
2. **Fed independence preserved** (FT, June 29) — Supreme Court blocks Trump from firing Fed Governor Cook. Maintains dollar credibility + mild dollar-weakening bias → strengthens VXUS/VWO thesis.
3. **CMCSA spinoff announced** (FT, June 29) — Comcast to spin off NBCUniversal and Sky. Parts-worth-more-than-whole special situation. Changes SELL → WATCH.

**Dominant market narrative:** AI compounders at fair multiples remain the core long. International (VXUS/VWO) gaining a second wind from dollar weakness + Iran resolution. The BIS AI-exuberance warning stays active — only buy AI names where FCF or earnings genuinely support the multiple.

## HIGH-CONFIDENCE FINAL TABLE

### BUY / ADD

| Ticker | Action | Conv | Entry Zone | Trigger | Why |
|--------|--------|------|-----------|---------|-----|
| AVGO | BUY | 5/5 | $370–380 | Above 200d, immediate | PEG 0.66, earnings +85%, revenue +48%, above 200d +4.3%. AI custom silicon moat. Best risk/reward in AI semis. |
| VXUS | BUY | 4/5 | $84–85 | Above 200d, immediate | PE 17.8 vs SPY 26. Above 200d +8.9%, only -4.3% from 52w high. Iran deal + Fed independence = dollar-negative tailwind. |
| VWO | BUY | 4/5 | $59–60 | Above 200d, immediate | PE 16.7, above 200d +6.1%. Iran deal removes EM risk premium. Dollar weakening multiplier for EM returns. |

### SELL / EXIT

| Ticker | Action | Conv | Urgency | Why |
|--------|--------|------|---------|-----|
| ORCL | SELL | 5/5 | HIGH | FCF yield **-5.73%** (burning cash on datacenter capex). -57% from 52w high. -26.2% below 200d. Revenue growth real but unbankable while FCF is negative. |
| ARE | SELL | 5/5 | HIGH | Fwd PE **negative** (-62). Revenue -11.5% declining. -38% from 52w high. Life science REIT thesis structurally broken. |
| ACN | SELL | 4/5 | HIGH | -59.3% from 52w high. -43.3% below 200d. C-suite selling. AI disrupting consulting revenue model. Even at fwd PE 8.5, no buyers stepping in. |
| PYPL | SELL | 4/5 | HIGH | Earnings growth **-6.2%** (declining). Inst cutting -5%, execs selling. -44.4% from 52w high. Cheap PE 7.7 but dead money — no catalyst. |
| LYFT | SELL | 4/5 | HIGH | Uber dominates structurally in rideshare + RoboTaxi future. -42.4% from 52w high. No competitive edge. FCF yield 21.8% interesting but thesis is structural, not cyclical. |
| COUR | SELL | 4/5 | HIGH | -80% from highs. EdTech AI disruption value trap. Insight (10% owner) dumped 1.9M shares May. No recovery path. |
| CAG | SELL | 4/5 | MEDIUM | Revenue -1%, zero growth. Packaged food secular decline. Tax-loss harvest opportunity. |
| GIS | SELL | 4/5 | MEDIUM | Earnings -14%, revenue +2% (near-flat). -50% from highs. Zero-growth defensive at fair valuation. No catalyst. |
| EPAM | SELL | 3/5 | MEDIUM | AI-services disruption. -47% below 200d. Insiders sold. Value trap. |
| MRVL | TRIM | 4/5 | THIS WEEK | **+128.7% above 200d** — extreme extension. Earnings -80.4%. AI semis late cycle. Take profit on the winner. |
| NEM | TRIM | 3/5 | THIS WEEK | Gold rolling over -3.4%/wk. NEM +74k winner. -6% below 200d starting to roll. Lock gains, keep small core multi-year. |

### HOLD

| GOOG | HOLD | 4/5 | Above 200d +12%. Revenue +22%, earnings +82%. But fwd PE 24.1, PEG 1.32 — not cheap enough to add. Hold current position. |
| FIS | HOLD | 4/5 | CEO Ferris bought in March + director Goldstein April — insider accumulation at dislocation. fwd PE 5.6, FCF yield 12%. Real value, not a trap. |
| NKE | HOLD | 3/5 | CEO Hill + 3 directors bought ~$0.7M open-market in April. Broken trend (-27.2% below 200d, earnings -34.8%) but smart-money dislocation buy. Hold. Watch for earnings stabilization. |
